title: Landmark study tests leading consciousness theories
summary: A large adversarial collaboration evaluated signatures predicted by major frameworks and found mixed support rather than a clean winner.

title: Allen Institute experiment on the origins of consciousness
summary: A coordinated multi-site experiment mapped brain-wide activity and challenged narrow assumptions about single-region explanations.

title: A modern neuroscience review of consciousness
summary: This Nature Reviews Neuroscience article synthesizes empirical progress, computational framings, and unresolved theory-level questions.

title: Recent PubMed-indexed consciousness research
summary: A 2024 paper adding evidence to mechanistic discussions around conscious access and distributed neural dynamics.
